docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEXTGEAR CAPITAL, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DULANI JABARI $53,994.42 PRINCIPAL, $27,301.95 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $81,731.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
